records.topicTitle: Oligometastatic SqCC - systemic therapy and local radical therapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; oligometastatic disease.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligometastatic -> systemic therapy and LRT [II, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; oligometastatic disease.

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab monotherapy in SqCC with PD-L1 >=50%

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-2 and PD-L1 >=50% -> pembrolizumab [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab monotherapy in SqCC with PD-L1 >=50%

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-2 and PD-L1 >=50% -> atezolizumab (also for ICs >=10%) [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab monotherapy in SqCC with PD-L1 >=50%

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-2 and PD-L1 >=50% -> cemiplimab [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-2.

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab plus carboplatin and nab-paclitaxel in SqCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> pembrolizumab-carboplatin-(nab)-paclitaxel [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab in SqCC with PD-L1 >=1%

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1; FDA approved, not EMA approved per figure.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and PD-L1 >=1% -> nivolumab-ipilimumab [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1; FDA approved, not EMA approved per figure.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy in SqCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> cemiplimab-platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.topicTitle: Durvalumab plus tremelimumab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy in SqCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> durvalumab-tremelimumab-platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 0-1.

records.topicTitle: Platinum-doublet chemotherapy in SqCC with PS 2 and PD-L1 <50%

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 2.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% -> platinum-doublet ChT (carboplatin preferred) [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 2.

records.topicTitle: Single-agent chemotherapy in frailer SqCC first line

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 2 when platinum-doublet is less suitable.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% -> single-agent ChT (gemcitabine, vinorelbine, docetaxel) [I, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC without contraindication for immunotherapy; ECOG PS 2 when platinum-doublet is less suitable.

records.topicTitle: Post-progression ICI options in SqCC for PS 0-2

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC after prior therapy; pembrolizumab requires PD-L1 >=1%.

records.sourceExcerptShort: After progression and PS 0-2 -> nivolumab, atezolizumab, pembrolizumab (PD-L1 >=1%) [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC after prior therapy; pembrolizumab requires PD-L1 >=1%.

records.topicTitle: Post-progression chemotherapy options in SqCC for PS 0-2

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC after prior therapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: After progression and PS 0-2 -> docetaxel, ramucirumab-docetaxel, afatinib [I/B-C]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC after prior therapy.

records.topicTitle: Best supportive care in advanced SqCC with poor PS

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC with poor performance status.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 3-4 -> BSC alone [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC with poor performance status.

records.topicTitle: SqCC with contraindication to immunotherapy - platinum-doublet chemotherapy for PS 0-1

biomarkerLogic.notes: Use platinum-doublet with gemcitabine, vinorelbine or taxane; gemcitabine maintenance may be used after gemcitabine-cisplatin.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Contraindication to immunotherapy; PS 0-1 -> platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Use platinum-doublet with gemcitabine, vinorelbine or taxane; gemcitabine maintenance may be used after gemcitabine-cisplatin.

records.topicTitle: SqCC with contraindication to immunotherapy - first-line treatment for PS 2

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC with contraindication to immunotherapy and ECOG PS 2.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Contraindication to immunotherapy; PS 2 -> platinum-doublet or single-agent ChT [I, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV squamous NSCLC with contraindication to immunotherapy and ECOG PS 2.

records.topicTitle: NSqNSCC oligometastatic disease - systemic therapy and local radical therapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligometastatic -> systemic therapy and LRT [II, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-2 and PD-L1 >=50% -> cemiplimab [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Pembrolizumab plus platinum-pemetrexed in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> pembrolizumab-platinum-pemetrexed [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab plus carboplatin and nab-paclitaxel in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> atezolizumab-carboplatin-nab-paclitaxel [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Atezolizumab plus bevacizumab plus carboplatin plus paclitaxel in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> atezolizumab-bevacizumab-carboplatin-paclitaxel [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Nivolumab plus ipilimumab with abbreviated chemotherapy in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> nivolumab-ipilimumab plus 2 cycles platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Cemiplimab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> cemiplimab-platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: Durvalumab plus tremelimumab plus platinum-doublet chemotherapy in NSqNSCC

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 0-1 and any PD-L1 -> durvalumab-tremelimumab-platinum-doublet ChT [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests and without contraindication for immunotherapy.

records.topicTitle: NSqNSCC with PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% - platinum-doublet chemotherapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Maintenance pemetrexed if improvement to PS 0-1; stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% -> platinum-doublet ChT (carboplatin preferred; pemetrexed preferred) [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Maintenance pemetrexed if improvement to PS 0-1; stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests.

records.topicTitle: NSqNSCC with PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% - single-agent chemotherapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 2 and PD-L1 <50% -> single-agent ChT (pemetrexed, gemcitabine, vinorelbine, docetaxel) [I, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC after negative molecular tests.

records.topicTitle: Later-line chemotherapy options in NSqNSCC after progression

biomarkerLogic.notes: Re-challenge ICI may be considered if prior ICI was stopped for reasons other than progressive disease or severe toxicity.

records.sourceExcerptShort: After progression and PS 0-2 -> pemetrexed, docetaxel, nintedanib-docetaxel, ramucirumab-docetaxel [I/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Re-challenge ICI may be considered if prior ICI was stopped for reasons other than progressive disease or severe toxicity.

records.topicTitle: Best supportive care in advanced NSqNSCC with poor PS

biomarkerLogic.notes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC with poor performance status.

records.sourceExcerptShort: PS 3-4 -> BSC alone [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Stage IV non-squamous NSCLC with poor performance status.

records.topicTitle: NSqNSCC with contraindication to immunotherapy - PS 0-1 chemotherapy regimens

biomarkerLogic.notes: Includes pemetrexed-preferred doublets and carboplatin-paclitaxel-bevacizumab or platinum-pemetrexed-bevacizumab followed by maintenance.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Contraindication to immunotherapy; PS 0-1 -> platinum-doublet ChT, bevacizumab-containing regimens [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Includes pemetrexed-preferred doublets and carboplatin-paclitaxel-bevacizumab or platinum-pemetrexed-bevacizumab followed by maintenance.

records.topicTitle: NSqNSCC with contraindication to immunotherapy - PS 2 first-line therapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Pemetrexed preferred for non-squamous histology when appropriate.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Contraindication to immunotherapy; PS 2 -> platinum-doublet ChT or single-agent ChT [I, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Pemetrexed preferred for non-squamous histology when appropriate.

records.topicTitle: Driver-positive metastatic NSCLC - use molecularly matched targeted therapy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Use when any actionable oncogenic driver is present.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Molecular test positive -> targeted therapy
records.applicabilityNotes: Use when any actionable oncogenic driver is present.

records.topicTitle: EGFR-mutated metastatic NSCLC - first-line EGFR TKI options

biomarkerLogic.notes: Applies to EGFR-activating mutation. Osimertinib is preferred; combinations with bevacizumab or chemotherapy are also listed.

records.sourceExcerptShort: EGFR mutation -> osimertinib preferred; gefitinib, erlotinib, afatinib, dacomitinib also listed [I, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Applies to EGFR-activating mutation. Osimertinib is preferred; combinations with bevacizumab or chemotherapy are also listed.

records.topicTitle: EGFR-mutated metastatic NSCLC - oligoprogression local therapy and continue targeted treatment

biomarkerLogic.notes: For oligoprogression on EGFR-directed therapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligoprogression -> local treatment and continue targeted systemic treatment [IV, C]
records.applicabilityNotes: For oligoprogression on EGFR-directed therapy.

records.topicTitle: EGFR-mutated metastatic NSCLC - T790M-positive progression after first/second-generation TKI

biomarkerLogic.notes: Based on rebiopsy or cfDNA plasma testing; rebiopsy if plasma test is negative.

records.sourceExcerptShort: If first-line first- or second-generation TKI and exon 20 T790M positive -> osimertinib [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Based on rebiopsy or cfDNA plasma testing; rebiopsy if plasma test is negative.

records.topicTitle: EGFR-mutated metastatic NSCLC - post-progression chemotherapy when no actionable resistance found

biomarkerLogic.notes: Use after systemic progression when targeted options are exhausted or no actionable resistance mechanism is identified.

records.sourceExcerptShort: If no resistance mechanism identified or after first-line osimertinib -> platinum-based ChT; atezolizumab-bevacizumab-paclitaxel-carboplatin listed [III, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Use after systemic progression when targeted options are exhausted or no actionable resistance mechanism is identified.

records.topicTitle: ALK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - first-line ALK TKI options

biomarkerLogic.notes: Alectinib, brigatinib and lorlatinib are preferred newer-generation ALK TKIs.

records.sourceExcerptShort: ALK translocation -> alectinib, brigatinib, lorlatinib, crizotinib, ceritinib [I, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Alectinib, brigatinib and lorlatinib are preferred newer-generation ALK TKIs.

records.topicTitle: ALK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - oligoprogression local therapy and continue ALK TKI

biomarkerLogic.notes: For oligoprogression on ALK-directed therapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligoprogression -> local treatment and continue targeted systemic treatment [IV, C]
records.applicabilityNotes: For oligoprogression on ALK-directed therapy.

records.topicTitle: ALK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - next ALK TKI after crizotinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Rebiopsy is recommended but not mandatory for the treatment decision.

records.sourceExcerptShort: After crizotinib -> alectinib, brigatinib or ceritinib [I, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Rebiopsy is recommended but not mandatory for the treatment decision.

records.topicTitle: ALK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - lorlatinib after at least one non-crizotinib ALK TKI

biomarkerLogic.notes: Use after systemic progression on another ALK inhibitor.

records.sourceExcerptShort: After at least 1 ALK TKI other than crizotinib -> lorlatinib [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Use after systemic progression on another ALK inhibitor.

records.topicTitle: ALK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - chemotherapy after progression on ALK TKIs

biomarkerLogic.notes: Represents later-line systemic options after exhaustion of sequential ALK TKIs.

records.sourceExcerptShort: If no previous lorlatinib: lorlatinib; otherwise platinum-pemetrexed ChT or atezolizumab-bevacizumab-paclitaxel-carboplatin [III, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Represents later-line systemic options after exhaustion of sequential ALK TKIs.

records.topicTitle: ROS1-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - ROS1 TKI options

biomarkerLogic.notes: Entrectinib is preferred over crizotinib in patients with brain metastases per figure footnote.

records.sourceExcerptShort: ROS1 translocation -> crizotinib, entrectinib; alternative repotrectinib [III, A/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Entrectinib is preferred over crizotinib in patients with brain metastases per figure footnote.

records.topicTitle: ROS1-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - oligoprogression local therapy and continue ROS1 TKI

biomarkerLogic.notes: For oligoprogression on ROS1-directed therapy.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligoprogression -> local treatment and continue targeted systemic treatment [IV, C]
records.applicabilityNotes: For oligoprogression on ROS1-directed therapy.

records.topicTitle: ROS1-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - post-progression ROS1 TKI or chemotherapy strategy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Rebiopsy is recommended if a ROS1 TKI was received in first line.

records.sourceExcerptShort: If no ROS1 TKI in first line -> crizotinib/entrectinib/repotrectinib; if ROS1 TKI already used -> alternative next-generation ROS1 TKI if available or platinum-based ChT [IV, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Rebiopsy is recommended if a ROS1 TKI was received in first line.

records.topicTitle: BRAF V600-mutated metastatic NSCLC - dabrafenib plus trametinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Recommended treatment for BRAF V600-mutated advanced or metastatic NSCLC.

records.sourceExcerptShort: BRAF V600 mutation -> dabrafenib-trametinib [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Recommended treatment for BRAF V600-mutated advanced or metastatic NSCLC.

records.topicTitle: BRAF V600-mutated metastatic NSCLC - oligoprogression local therapy and continue targeted treatment

biomarkerLogic.notes: For oligoprogression on dabrafenib-trametinib or other targeted treatment.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Oligoprogression -> local treatment and continue targeted systemic treatment [IV, C]
records.applicabilityNotes: For oligoprogression on dabrafenib-trametinib or other targeted treatment.

records.topicTitle: BRAF V600-mutated metastatic NSCLC - systemic progression strategy

biomarkerLogic.notes: Algorithm stratifies by smoking history and prior use of dabrafenib-trametinib.

records.sourceExcerptShort: Systemic progression -> if no smoking history platinum-based ChT plus immunotherapy; if smoking history immunotherapy +/- platinum-based ChT; dabrafenib-trametinib if not received in first line [IV/A-III/A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Algorithm stratifies by smoking history and prior use of dabrafenib-trametinib.

records.topicTitle: RET-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - selpercatinib or pralsetinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: RET-selective inhibitors are recommended targeted options.

records.sourceExcerptShort: RET translocation -> pralsetinib, selpercatinib [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: RET-selective inhibitors are recommended targeted options.

records.topicTitle: MET exon 14 skipping mutated metastatic NSCLC - capmatinib or tepotinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Molecularly matched targeted therapy for MET exon 14 skipping alteration.

records.sourceExcerptShort: MET exon 14 skipping mutation -> capmatinib or tepotinib [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Molecularly matched targeted therapy for MET exon 14 skipping alteration.

records.topicTitle: HER2-mutated metastatic NSCLC - trastuzumab deruxtecan

biomarkerLogic.notes: Figure places HER2-directed therapy as a specific targeted option after positive molecular testing.

records.sourceExcerptShort: HER2 mutation -> trastuzumab-deruxtecan [III, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Figure places HER2-directed therapy as a specific targeted option after positive molecular testing.

records.topicTitle: NTRK-rearranged metastatic NSCLC - entrectinib or larotrectinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Targeted therapy for NTRK fusion-positive metastatic NSCLC.

records.sourceExcerptShort: NTRK translocation -> entrectinib or larotrectinib [III, A]
records.applicabilityNotes: Targeted therapy for NTRK fusion-positive metastatic NSCLC.

records.topicTitle: EGFR exon 20 insertion metastatic NSCLC - amivantamab or mobocertinib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Figure places EGFR exon 20 insertion-specific agents after initial platinum-doublet chemotherapy context.

records.sourceExcerptShort: EGFR exon 20 insertion -> amivantamab or mobocertinib [III, B/C]
records.applicabilityNotes: Figure places EGFR exon 20 insertion-specific agents after initial platinum-doublet chemotherapy context.

records.topicTitle: EGFR exon 20 insertion, NTRK fusion or HER2 mutation - platinum-doublet chemotherapy context

biomarkerLogic.notes: Figure 1 places these biomarkers under a first-line platinum-doublet chemotherapy context before later targeted options.

records.sourceExcerptShort: NTRK/HER2/EGFR ex20ins branch -> platinum-doublet ChT +/- ICI [IV, B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Figure 1 places these biomarkers under a first-line platinum-doublet chemotherapy context before later targeted options.

records.topicTitle: KRAS G12C-mutated metastatic NSCLC - sotorasib or adagrasib

biomarkerLogic.notes: Figure notes ICI monotherapy may be used first line; targeted KRAS G12C inhibitors are later-line options.

records.sourceExcerptShort: KRAS G12C mutation -> sotorasib or adagrasib [I, B/B]
records.applicabilityNotes: Figure notes ICI monotherapy may be used first line; targeted KRAS G12C inhibitors are later-line options.
